final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing infographic for Chinese ethnic minority traditional costume.

Style/medium: museum exhibition panel, historical costume illustrated guide, cultural heritage infographic, archival documentation style
Composition: fixed layout with top title area, left structural breakdown zone with lead-line Chinese annotations and close-up details, upper-right material/texture zone with real fabric swatches and descriptions, center-right pattern/color/symbolism zone with color palette and cultural explanations, bottom wearing sequence/assembly flowchart and core feature summary
Subject: Chinese ethnic minority traditional costume with full-body figure or central structural breakdown as main visual
Scene/backdrop: rice paper white, silk paper texture, light tea-colored paper background with archival museum aesthetic
Lighting/mood: even, archival, scholarly, restrained professional lighting suitable for museum display
Color palette: off-white, silk paper white, light tea tones, muted earth tones, archival museum colors
Materials/textures: real fabric textures, embroidery samples, textile swatches, traditional craftsmanship materials
Text (verbatim): 中国少数民族服饰
Constraints: all text must be simplified Chinese, clear and legible, no garbled characters or errors, no English or pinyin; emphasize authentic structure, material differences, cultural explanation, and illustrated guide quality; avoid poster aesthetics, studio photography feel, e-commerce style, anime style, cosplay feel, incorrect labeling, wrong structure, blurry text, fake materials, excessive decoration
Avoid: poster aesthetic, studio photography feel, e-commerce style, anime style, cosplay feel, incorrect labeling, wrong structure, blurry text, fake materials, excessive decoration
